title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators
description: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Learners cumulatively produce a collection-processing and streaming pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose mutating or copying array operations and document ownership before updating shared data.
Use map, filter, reduce, find, some, every, flat, and flatMap from the required output and early-exit behavior.
Sort with a valid comparator, copying policy, stability expectations, and locale-aware text rules.
